meta.posNote: pos group = current primaryPosition (drafted position not in feed)
meta.eraNote: era = slot-history/aWAR coverage range (draft classes 2018+; first 2018-class MLB debut was Sept '19) — expMean/WOE/debutSpeed are realized-to-date over this full era, no maturity gate
meta.debutSpeedNote: median years from draft to MLB debut, HS vs College picks, over all swept (2018+) picks; non-debuted picks excluded
